HomePage.title: Your Skin, Synced.
HomePage.description: Localized skincare routines tailored for the Malaysian climate and your unique skin concerns.

Footer.about: Expertly curated skincare routines for the modern Malaysian, powered by science and local knowledge.

Consent.title: Before we start
Consent.intro: To build your personalized routine, we need to collect a few details about your skin.
Consent.what: Your skin type, primary skin concerns, daily environment, and sensitivity level.
Consent.why: This is used only to score and recommend a skincare routine matched to your skin and Malaysia's climate.
Consent.storage: Your answers are stored securely in our database (Supabase). We don't sell this data, and it's shared with marketplaces only as an anonymous click when you choose to shop a recommended product — never your quiz answers.
Consent.retention: Until you delete your account or ask us to remove it. See our Privacy Policy for full details.
Consent.checkboxLabel: I've read the <privacyLink>Privacy Policy</privacyLink> and agree to SkinSync collecting and storing my skin type, concerns, environment, and sensitivity information to generate my routine.

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.intro: SkinSync ("we") provides a skincare diagnostic quiz for the Malaysian market. This policy explains what personal data we collect, why, and how it's handled, in line with Malaysia's Personal Data Protection Act 2010 (PDPA).

whatSection.title: What we collect
whatSection.body: When you take the Skin Quiz, we collect your skin type, primary skin concerns, typical daily environment, and skin sensitivity level. Under the PDPA, information about your skin condition is treated as sensitive personal data, which is why we ask for your explicit consent before collecting it. If you create an account, we also collect your email address for authentication.

whySection.title: Why we collect it
whySection.body: We use your quiz answers solely to score and recommend a skincare routine suited to your skin type, concerns, and Malaysia's climate. If you're signed in, we save your quiz results so you can view them again from your dashboard.

storageSection.title: How it's stored and who has access
storageSection.body: Your data is stored with Supabase, our database provider, which acts as a data processor on our behalf. We do not sell your personal data. When you click through to shop a recommended product, we record which product and marketplace (Shopee, Lazada, or TikTok Shop) you clicked — not your quiz answers — so we can measure which recommendations are useful.

retentionSection.title: How long we keep it
retentionSection.body: We retain your quiz answers and account data until you delete your account or contact us to request removal.

rightsSection.title: Your rights
rightsSection.body: Under the PDPA, you may request access to, correction of, or deletion of your personal data at any time by contacting us using the details below.

contactSection.title: Contact us
contactSection.body: For any questions about this policy or your data, contact us at privacy@skinsync.example.

Terms.title: Terms of Service
Terms.intro: By using SkinSync, you agree to these terms.

serviceSection.title: The service
serviceSection.body: SkinSync provides a skincare diagnostic quiz and routine recommendations for informational purposes. We are not a medical provider, and our recommendations are not medical advice — consult a dermatologist for skin conditions requiring professional care.

affiliateSection.title: Advertisement / Affiliate disclosure
affiliateSection.body: SkinSync's product recommendations link to third-party marketplaces — Shopee, Lazada, and TikTok Shop. These are affiliate links: SkinSync may earn a commission on qualifying purchases made through them, at no extra cost to you. This is a paid, commission-based arrangement and should be treated as an advertisement.

accountSection.title: Accounts
accountSection.body: You're responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activity under your account.

liabilitySection.title: Limitation of liability
liabilitySection.body: SkinSync recommendations are provided "as is" without warranty. We are not liable for reactions to, or outcomes from, products purchased through our recommendations.

contactSection.title: Contact us
contactSection.body: For any questions about these terms, contact us at hello@skinsync.example.

skinType.question: What is your primary skin type?
skinType.oilyDesc: Shiny, large pores, prone to breakouts.
skinType.combinationDesc: Oily T-zone, dry or normal cheeks.

concerns.question: Select your primary skin concerns (pick up to 3)

environment.question: What is your typical daily environment?
environment.barrierWarning: Heat and humidity trap heavy, occlusive creams against the skin, which can break down your moisture barrier and clog pores. We'll prioritize lightweight gels and non-comedogenic formulas for your routine.

Auth.signInDesc: Sign in to your account to view your routine.
Auth.signUpDesc: Create an account to save your diagnostic results and access subscriptions.
Auth.noAccount: Don't have an account? Sign Up
Auth.hasAccount: Already have an account? Sign In
